/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--version-script="/home/hviswan/Documents/Neural-Monte-Carlo-Fluid-Simulation/bindings/zombie_3d_delta/deps/tbb/src/tbbmalloc_proxy/def/lin64-proxy.def" -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -L/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -shared -Wl,-soname,libtbbmalloc_proxy.so.2 -o ../../../../gnu_10.5_cxx11_64_release/libtbbmalloc_proxy.so.2.16 CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc_proxy.dir/function_replacement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc_proxy.dir/proxy.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hviswan/Documents/Neural-Monte-Carlo-Fluid-Simulation/bindings/zombie_3d_delta/build/gnu_10.5_cxx11_64_release ../../../../gnu_10.5_cxx11_64_release/libtbbmalloc.so.2.16 -ldl
